description: A manufacturing technician reported damage to a specific serialized component during assembly. You must process this exception in Odoo. Log in (admin@example.com / admin) and open Manufacturing Order 'MO-00001' for the '4K Laser Projector'. Scrap the damaged component 'Optical Lens Array' (Serial Number 'LENS-A001') and update the manufacturing order to consume the replacement unit 'LENS-A002' instead. Complete the production by assigning the final product Serial Number 'PROJ-X99' and marking the Manufacturing Order as Done.
